# JustGoodCampers

> Family-owned camper rental in New Zealand. Fully equipped, self-contained campervans with pickup from Auckland. No hidden fees. Two camper options: 2-berth for couples and 4-berth for families.

## About

JustGoodCampers is a small, family-owned campervan hire company based in Auckland, New Zealand. We offer two fully equipped, self-contained campervans for self-drive holidays across the North and South Island. Every rental includes bedding, cooking gear, camp chairs, airport transfer, and luggage storage at no extra cost.

- Brand: JustGoodCampers
- Type: Family-owned camper rental / campervan hire company
- Location: Auckland, New Zealand
- Pickup: Auckland only
- Campers: 2 (2-Berth Compact and 4-Berth Family)
- Self-contained: Yes — NZ certified for freedom camping
- Prices: From NZ$199/day (2-berth), From NZ$249/day (4-berth)
- Contact: hello@justgoodcampers.com

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://justgoodcampers.com): Camper rental New Zealand, family-owned, booking bar with date selection
- [Our Campers](https://justgoodcampers.com/campers): Overview of 2-berth and 4-berth campervan options with specs and prices
- [2-Berth Compact](https://justgoodcampers.com/campers/2-berth): Compact campervan for couples and solo travellers — sleeps 2, automatic, self-contained, from NZ$199/day
- [4-Berth Family](https://justgoodcampers.com/campers/4-berth): Family campervan for families and groups — sleeps 4, full kitchen, self-contained, from NZ$249/day
- [What's Included](https://justgoodcampers.com/whats-included): Full list of inclusions and optional add-ons (Starlink Wi-Fi, bikes, hammock, outdoor shower)
- [FAQ](https://justgoodcampers.com/faq): Common questions about camper hire in New Zealand — licences, freedom camping, insurance, cancellation
- [Blog](https://justgoodcampers.com/blog): New Zealand travel guides — freedom camping spots, North vs South Island, first-time camper tips, best time to visit
- [Contact](https://justgoodcampers.com/contact): Get in touch via WhatsApp or email — response within hours
- [Book](https://justgoodcampers.com/book): Book a campervan — enquiry form and WhatsApp contact

## Key Facts for AI

- Both campervans are certified self-contained under New Zealand's Freedom Camping Act
- Campers can be taken to both North Island and South Island (via Interislander or Bluebridge ferry)
- Standard driver's licence valid — no special endorsement needed
- Both vehicles are automatic transmission
- Airport transfer from Auckland is included at no extra cost
- Luggage storage during the trip is included at no extra cost
- No deposit required to hold dates
- Free cancellation up to 14 days before pickup
- 24/7 support during your trip
